productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Black Jacket
description: CompositionBlack puffer jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck with a full zippered front placket, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, appliquéd brand patch on the left chest and a ribbed hem with striped trimsFitRegularWash careWash similar colours togetherMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeDesigned to brave the elements, this padded jacket from US Polo is a high performance piece. Sharply and slickly designed with a structured silhouette, you'll look in-style even on off-weather days. Wear this with flat front trousers from indigo nation, brogues and a high-neck sweater. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
